runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

import { registrationSchema, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];

const onSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values);
  return values;
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="{
      username: '',
      email: '',
      role: 'user',
      otherInfo: '',
      newsletter: false,
      frequency: undefined,
      bio: '',
    }"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="{ onSubmit }"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only for contributors -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Contribution Details"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution details"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter Checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: only when newsletter is subscribed -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

import { registrationSchema, type RegistrationFormValues } from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];

const onSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values);
  return values;
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="{ username: '', email: '', role: 'user', otherInfo: '', newsletter: false, frequency: undefined, bio: '' }"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="{ onSubmit }"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only for contributors -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Contribution Details"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution details"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter Checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: only when newsletter is subscribed -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form.isSubmitting"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

import { registrationSchema, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];

const onSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values);
  return values;
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="{
      username: '',
      email: '',
      role: 'user',
      otherInfo: '',
      newsletter: false,
      frequency: undefined,
      bio: '',
    }"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="{ onSubmit }"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only for contributors -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Contribution Details"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution details"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter Checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: only when newsletter is subscribed -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

compilation_errors: src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue(16,8): error TS2307: Cannot find module '@/registration/types' or its corresponding type declarations.
runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues
} from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Giornaliero" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Almeno 3 caratteri"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === "contributor""
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Descrizione del contributo"
        placeholder="Spiega cosa ti puoi offrire"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Scrivi qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>
